title: Morning by Big Ben
synopsis: A child and her father start the day near one of London's most famous landmarks.
sentences: Mila stood by the river in London on a cool spring morning.
The sky was pale blue, and the city was waking up slowly.
Across the road, she saw the tall clock tower that people call Big Ben.
Its golden details shone softly in the early light.
Mila held her father's hand and listened for the deep bell.
When the clock struck, the sound rolled across the street and over the water.
Tourists stopped to take pictures, and buses passed with a loud rumble.
Her father smiled and pointed toward the Houses of Parliament beside the tower.
He explained that many important decisions were made there.
Mila felt small, but she also felt excited to stand in such a famous place.
Before they left, they bought hot chocolate from a nearby stand.
It was a simple morning, but Mila knew she would remember it for a long time.
